name: Pizza Hut Cavatini
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Uncooked assorted pasta, cook al dente
1 can Prego spaghetti sauce, flavored in meat
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat in oil.
2. Crumble with a fork until the pink color disappears.
3. Turn off heat and add remaining ingredients.
4. Stir lightly to combine.
5. Allow sauce to cook, uncovered about 20 minutes without boiling.
6. Alternate layers of cooked pasta, sauce, slices of mozzarella, and half the provolone in individual au gratin dishes or small oven-proof serving dishes.
